markdown.markdown:
::: {.panel-tabset} ```{ojs inputs_table_layout} // html`

Table layout

` // Border viewof st_table_border = Inputs.form({ border_color: Inputs.color({ label: "Table border color", value: "#000000" }), border_size: Inputs.range([0, 3], { step: 0.1, label: "Table border size (px)", value: 1 }) }) ``` ## Header ```{ojs inputs_table_header, cold-folde: true} // html`

Table header

` // Header viewof st_table_header = Inputs.form({ bg_color: Inputs.color({ label: "Table header background color", value: "#021b97" }), font_color: Inputs.color({ label: "Table header text color", value: "#f0f2ff" }), font_size: Inputs.range([0.5, 2], { step: 0.1, label: "Table header font size (em)", value: 1 }) }) ``` ## Body ::: {layout-ncol="2"} ```{ojs inputs_table_body} // html`

Table body

` // Body viewof st_table_body = Inputs.form({ bg_color: Inputs.color({ label: "Table body background color", value: "#ffffff" }), font_color: Inputs.color({ label: "Table body text color", value: "#021b97" }), font_size: Inputs.range([0.5, 2], { step: 0.1, label: "Table body font size (em)", value: 1 }) }) ``` ```{ojs} // html`

Table body detailed

` // Table body rows viewof st_table_body_odd_rows_bg_color = Inputs.color({ label: "Table odd row background color", value: "#ffffff" }) viewof st_table_body_even_rows_bg_color = Inputs.color({ label: "Table even row background color", value: "#ffffff" }) ``` ::: ## Inner tables/graphs ::: {layout-ncol="2"} ```{ojs inputs_table_small_body} // html`

Inner tables(tables in columns)

` // Inner tables viewof st_table_inner_table = Inputs.form({ border_color: Inputs.color({ label: "Border color", value: "#ffffff" }), border_size: Inputs.range([0, 3], { step: 0.1, label: "Border size (px)", value: 1 }), margin: Inputs.range([0, 50], { step: 0.5, label: "Margin", value: 0 }), text_align: Inputs.radio(["left", "center", "right"], { label: "Align", value: "right" }), odd_row_bg_color: Inputs.color({ label: "Odd row bg color", value: "#ffffff" }), even_row_bg_color: Inputs.color({ label: "Even row bg color", value: "#ffffff" }) }) st_table_inner_table.text_align ``` ```{ojs} // Inner plots (bar graphs) --> .st-table tbody td img.img-fluid{} viewof st_table_inner_graph = Inputs.form({ bg_color: Inputs.color({ label: "Graph bg color", value: "#ffffff" }), border_radius: Inputs.range([0, 50], { step: 0.5, label: "Graph border radius", value: 0 }), padding: Inputs.range([0, 50], { step: 0.5, label: "Graph padding", value: 0 }), margin: Inputs.range([0, 50], { step: 0.5, label: "Graph margin", value: 0 }) }) ``` ::: ## Copy CSS ```{ojs copy_css_button} //| echo: false import {Copier} from "@mbostock/copier" Copier("Copy CSS to clipboard", {value: cssText}) ``` ```{ojs print_cssText} //| echo: false // cssText html`
${cssText}
` ``` ```{ojs inputs_to_css} //| echo: false // Generate CSS text cssText = ` /* Table layout */ .st-table { border: ${st_table_border.border_size}px solid ${st_table_border.border_color}; } /* Table header */ .st-table thead th, .st-table tr.header th { color: ${st_table_header.font_color}; background-color: ${st_table_header.bg_color}; font-size: ${st_table_header.font_size}em; } /* Table body */ .st-table tbody td { color: ${st_table_body.font_color}; background-color: ${st_table_body.bg_color} !important; font-size: ${st_table_body.font_size}em; } /* Table body rows */ /* Odd rows .st-table tr:nth-child(odd) td { background-color: ${st_table_body_odd_rows_bg_color} !important; }*/ /* Even rows .st-table tr:nth-child(even) td { background-color: ${st_table_body_even_rows_bg_color} !important; }*/ /* Outer table - odd rows */ .st-table > tbody > tr:nth-child(odd) > td { background-color: ${st_table_body_odd_rows_bg_color} !important; } /* Outer table - even rows */ .st-table > tbody > tr:nth-child(even) > td { background-color: ${st_table_body_even_rows_bg_color} !important; } /* Inner table - odd rows */ .st-table tbody .table-sm > tbody > tr:nth-child(odd) > td { background-color: ${st_table_inner_table.odd_row_bg_color} !important; } /* Inner table - even rows */ .st-table tbody .table-sm > tbody > tr:nth-child(even) > td { background-color: ${st_table_inner_table.even_row_bg_color} !important; } /* Inner tables */ .st-table tbody .table-sm { border-color: ${st_table_inner_table.border_color} !important; border: ${st_table_inner_table.border_size}px solid #000000; margin: ${st_table_inner_table.margin}px !important; text-align: ${st_table_inner_table.text_align} !important; /* border-collapse: collapse; */ } /* Inner table graph */ .st-table tbody td img.img-fluid { background-color: ${st_table_inner_graph.bg_color} !important; border-radius: ${st_table_inner_graph.border_radius}px !important; padding: ${st_table_inner_graph.padding}px !important; margin: ${st_table_inner_graph.margin}px !important; } ` // ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ ``` ```{ojs generate_css} //| echo: false // DO NOT DELETE // Apply CSS from inputs to entire document html` ` ``` ::: ::: {.panel-fill} ```{r setup} #| echo: false #| warning: false library(summarytools) library(data.table) ``` ```{r create_fake_table_data} #| echo: false #| warning: false set.seed(123) data <- data.table( group = factor(sample(c("A", "B", "C"), 20, replace = TRUE)), gender = factor(sample(c("Male", "Female"), 20, replace = TRUE)), age = sample(20:60, 20, replace = TRUE), income = sample(30000:80000, 20, replace = TRUE) ) # Insert missing values data[sample(.N, 2), age := NA] data[sample(.N, 2), income := NA] data[sample(.N, 1), group := NA] ``` ```{r st_gloabls} #| echo: false #| warning: false # st_options( # footnote = NA # ) ``` ```{r dfsummary} #| echo: false summary = dfSummary( data, na.col = TRUE ) print( summary, method = "render", ) ``` :::
